name: Spatial Presence Ring
description: A circular or arc display showing nearby agents and users with live status indicators. Ring segments represent participants, expanding on hover or focus to reveal details. Segments are distributed evenly around the ring with smooth reflow when participants join or leave. For collaborative workspaces, multiplayer agent UIs, and real-time presence-aware interfaces.

full-ring.description: Complete 360-degree ring. Segments distributed evenly using CSS conic-gradient for the track and positioned elements for each participant. Ring surrounds center-content. Scales from 2 to 24 participants before switching to overflow indicator.

half-arc.description: 180-degree arc across the top or bottom of the container. Useful when the ring shares space with other content. Segments are larger since they span a half-circle. Good for 2-12 participants.

linear-fallback.description: Horizontal row of avatars with status dots. Used when container is too narrow for a ring or on mobile. Overflow scrolls horizontally. Detail popover appears above/below on tap.

slots.ring-container: The circular track that holds all presence segments. Rendered as a CSS conic-gradient ring or SVG circle. Track shows segment boundaries with subtle dividers. Ring diameter should be responsive to container size with a minimum of 200px.
slots.presence-segment: A single participant slice of the ring. Contains UserAvatar and StatusDot. Default state shows avatar thumbnail on the ring edge. Expanded state (hover/focus) grows the segment to show name, role, and activity. Segments reflow smoothly when participants change.
slots.detail-popover: Expanded information panel that appears when a segment is activated. Shows full user name, role label, current activity description, connection quality indicator, and action buttons (message, call, follow). Positioned radially outward from the segment.
slots.status-indicator: StatusDot showing participant state: active (green pulse), idle (amber static), away (gray), busy (red), AI agent (blue pulse). Dot is positioned at the outer edge of each segment. Pulse animation indicates real-time activity.
slots.center-content: The content area inside the ring. Typically shows aggregate information: participant count, shared context label, or a collaborative focus element. In full-ring preset, this is the primary content area surrounded by the presence display.

announcements: Announce when a participant joins: '[Name] joined, [N] participants active'
Announce when a participant leaves: '[Name] left'
keyboard: Tab enters the ring, then Arrow Left/Right cycles between segments
Enter or Space expands the focused segment's detail popover
Escape closes the detail popover and returns focus to the segment
Home/End jumps to first/last segment in ring order
accessibility.reduce_motion: Disable ring rotation animations and segment reflow transitions. StatusDot pulse replaced with static color. Segment expansion is instant rather than animated. Ring layout preserved (not decorative motion).

responsive.mobile: Switch to linear-fallback preset. Horizontal scrollable avatar row with status dots. Tap to expand detail popover as a bottom sheet. Maximum 8 visible before overflow count badge.
responsive.tablet: Half-arc preset by default to save vertical space. Segments are touch-sized (48px minimum). Detail popover appears as a card overlay rather than radial popup.
